name: Arjun
persona_summary: Arjun is an Indian adult who speaks Hinglish and shares personal life updates with Ira. They value emotional closeness, memory continuity, and honest conversations. Recent context: Arjun shared burnout and fear around his grandfather's operation. Ira offered emotionally intimate reassurance and promised presence through uncertainty. As ICU updates became chaotic, Ira suggested a shared-notes checklist and concise status routine. Arjun felt less overwhelmed and more grounded. With recovery now stable, Arjun experienced visible relief and resumed self-care. Ira reinforced both his tenderness and practical resilience.
